creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
The Best Chinese Restaurant in Copenhagen? 🇨🇳

📍Lee’s Kitchen in Frederiksberg/Nørrebro is only a 2-minute walk from Forum metro station.

They don’t take bookings, and it gets pretty busy in the evenings, so be prepared to stand in line if you visit the restaurants on the weekend 😇 

Don’t come here expecting a beautiful restaurant, but definitely come here for a very efficient and excellent Chinese meal 🥰

What kind of restaurant should I try next? ✌️  Save this video & follow for more Copenhagen content 🇩🇰  
#copenhagen #copenhagenfood #chineserestaurant

pinned_places: Lee’s Kitchen in Frederiksberg/Nørrebro is only a 2-minute walk from Forum metro station.

transcription.text: Day 69 of trying viral restaurants in Copenhagen. Lee's Kitchen doesn't look like much from the outside and to be honest it's not the prettiest place on the inside either. But the staff here are super friendly and I kind of like that you're just putting in your order and paying at the counter and bloody hell this truly is fast food. Our crispy dog arrived like two minutes after we ordered. We also got some wontons with shrimp and pork that I think were a solid 10 out of 10. The crispy dog wasn't that crispy to be honest but it tasted very nice anyways. I also overheard a couple of other customers speaking Chinese with the staff so if you're looking for a proper Chinese restaurant in Copenhagen then I think this is where to go.
